name: RPlog_Zik_and_Joh_Talk_p2
title: A Lightsaber in the Cockpit
summary: Continuing their conversation in the Paladin's shipyard, the Jedi Johanna te Danaan tries to dissuade Colonel Enb'Zik from his stone-artifact mission, denouncing the archaeologist Kyle Senesca and the whole idea as foolish without revealing her own harrowing history with the cursed stones on Tatooine and Kashyyyk. Zik defends his orders, pointing out that the recon of Orphenhalz deep in Imperial space, not the stones, is the real objective, and Johanna relaxes once she learns extraction is not the goal, urging him to call her immediately if stones turn up. As the two climb onto Zik's starfighter and reminisce about Jedi lore from his childhood, Johanna spots a deactivated lightsaber stowed in the cockpit. Embarrassed, Zik admits it is something he has long been tinkering with, built around a focusing crystal gifted to his parents before the Old Republic fell, and confesses it has never worked quite right. Johanna ignites her own white-bladed saber to compare, warns him not to play with his until a Jedi can examine it, and the moment turns quietly personal as Zik reveals how much the weapon means to him.
